ch0338_40_sazare/0101_0701_01_10:
[Name:PlayerNickname ]! Hey, kiddo!
Now we can be school buddies!
ch0338_40_sazare/0101_0701_02_10:
Let’s tackle our studies together as fellow
students!
ch0338_40_sazare/7101_0701_01_10:
The way I see it, photos taken with friends
have a different vibe from those by a
photographer.
ch0338_40_sazare/7101_0701_02_10:
There are some photos you can only capture
when both you and your subject have
captured each other.
ch0338_40_sazare/7101_0701_03_10:
A photographer’s skill truly shines in how
they bring out their subject’s true essence!
ch0338_40_sazare/7102_0701_01_10:
Students grow quick, which makes it fun to
photograph student life.
ch0338_40_sazare/7102_0701_02_10:
Part of the joy of photography is capturing
the differences between each day!
ch0338_40_sazare/7103_0701_01_10:
At night, when it’s all quiet, the academy
has a certain charm to it.
ch0338_40_sazare/7103_0701_02_10:
It’s the total opposite of its daytime
liveliness. More solemn.
ch0338_40_sazare/7103_0701_03_10:
It helps you realize even buildings have
different “faces”—just like people and
Pokémon.
ch0338_40_sazare/7104_0701_01_10:
I wonder if I could hold an academy
photography contest.
ch0338_40_sazare/7104_0701_02_10:
Then, if enough students are interested,
I could start a photography club!
ch0338_40_sazare/7105_0701_01_10:
From here on out, I want you to attend lots
of classes, all right?
ch0338_40_sazare/7105_0701_02_10:
You, earnestly tackling all your coursework...
Now THAT’S a perfect picture!
ch0338_40_sazare/1701_0701_02_10: Could you take this for me?
ch0338_40_sazare/1701_0702_01_10:
Think of it as a thank-you for always letting
me capture your expressions!
ch0338_40_sazare/2501_0701_01_10:
At Pasio Academy, anyone can come and
learn as a student, regardless of their age
or background.
ch0338_40_sazare/2501_0701_02_10:
You get to meet people you wouldn’t
normally hang out with.
ch0338_40_sazare/2501_0701_03_10:
It’s a nice place to learn AND mingle. I wish
there were more places like it.
ch0338_40_sazare/2501_0702_01_10:
My family’s motto is “time wasted is lost,”
but recently, I’m not sure I’ve been
embodying it so well.
ch0338_40_sazare/2501_0702_02_10: Each day is so fun, it’s over before I know it!
ch0338_40_sazare/2501_0702_03_10:
I guess that just proves how fulfilling my
days are. But part of me still feels guilty,
you know?
ch0338_40_sazare/2511_0701_01_10:
One of the best parts of student life is
hanging out with friends after school.
ch0338_40_sazare/2511_0701_02_10:
Getting food around town, having Pokémon
battles with each other...
ch0338_40_sazare/2511_0701_03_10: It’s the glue that binds us together.
ch0338_40_sazare/2511_0702_01_10:
And capturing those moments just makes
them all the better!
ch0338_40_sazare/2511_0702_02_10:
When I think about what my academy life
holds next, I can hardly contain my
excitement!
ch0338_40_sazare/3001_0701_01_10:
Morning! Can I get a nice shot of you kicking
off your day?
ch0338_40_sazare/3003_0701_01_10:
Every experience is valuable! It’s important
to take detours in life sometimes, you know?
ch0338_40_sazare/3005_0701_01_10:
The moon looks so beautiful... Maybe I
could set up a tent and capture this moment.
